title: Unusual End
body:
![Bolok plush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f1623a765e930ade293e174527383f83c2c2a28.png) **Support us at [https://unusualsquad.com/plushies](https://unusualsquad.com/plushies) !** **Unusual End is a mod enhancing the End, by providing more diversity and content to the dimension, while trying to fit Vanilla and Modded End experiences. The wiki is covering the main features, but the mod provide a lot of content that isn't described here** Check [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unusual-end) for a more detailled wiki
Video Showcases (slightly outdated)
Reworked Vanilla biomes End Highlands will now be covered in patches of diverse plants and Raw Purpur (**this can be removed in the config**). You will now encounter Firefly Nests, home to Ender Fireflies, and Chorus Cane patches. Both will provide you with Chorus Cane Planks, a small amount of wood. Ender Fireflies can be tamed with End Blob and will protect you from Endermites, Enderblobs, and Small Enderblubs. You might now rarely encounter Endstone Trappers, hiding in Infested End Stone. These creatures cannot be killed and will bite your feet. You can either sneak to stay undetected, break the block to kill it, or capture the entity with an End Stone block. Undead Enderlings also fly around, serving as an aggressive counterpart to Endermen, making bridges over the Void more dangerous. When hurt, they turn invisible and gain a larger attack reach. **Use a Citrine Candle to despawn nearby Undead Enderlings**. New structures can be found in this biomes : - **End House**: Provides random rewards and often a map to the nearest Ancient End Tower. - **Ancient End Tower**: Filled with loot and traps for advanced players. - **Flying End Ships**: Found above the Void, containing Void Totems and maps to End Cities. - **Wanderer Islands**: Small houses with Wandering Traders that sell mod-related items and Wandering Stew, which returns players to the Overworld. Draglings are new small entities found in some structures, that randomly inflict "Disruption," preventing you from interacting with or destroying blocks.
Gloopy Plains Gloopy Plains are chunks of land distorted and covered in purple agglomerates, home to various Endermite-related entities: Enderblobs, Small Enderbulbs, and Enderbulbs. Some of these creatures can inflict "Ender Infection," causing debuffs such as periodic damage or random teleportation. The Crystal Flower, found here, periodically weakens nearby players, and interacting with it causes nausea. This biome is rich in **Shiny Crystals** (used for regeneration) and **Prismalite**, a rarer resource found in Gloopy Nests. **Ruins** and Gloopstone piles can be found, often leading to small underground rooms filled with Endermite eggs and Gloopy Urns.
Warped Reef Warped Reef appears to be a mutation that evolved into the Warped Forest found in the Nether. The reef contains entities similar to aquatic creatures, like **Bluk**, which can be hunted for food, and **Bolok**, which can "warp" items into variants. You will also encounter new plants, such as Warped Squash and Warped Berries. Fishing here allows you to obtain warped items and foods. The **Spunkler** is a rare Shulker variant hiding in Warped Reef, while entities like the **Glub** can be worn to give jump boosts and slow falling. **Citrine Islands** can be found at the bottom of Warped Reef, where citrine crystals grow. **Warped Ships** and **Warped Stations** contain **Warped Chests**, which multiple players can access for random items. Warped Anchors and Warped Infusions are obtained through Warped Chests.
Extra Information / Q&A I'm not sure if i should play this mod, i don't like X feature, and this thing generating in the End Highlands. Is there a config to the mod ? -> Give it a try and take a look at the config file. A lot of stuff is configurable, and generation changes affecting vanilla biomes can be mostly toggled. "unusualend-common" can be found in the "config" folder, and will provide you with the ability to edit a lot of aspects, from cooldowns of some items to disabling some generation tweaks sure as the addition of Raw Purpur Patchs and End Highland Flora. Is this mod working with X other End mod ? -> The is no known incompatibility with other end mods, and mods like The Outer End, Endless Biomes, End's Phantasm or Enlightened have been tested multiples times. The only issue you might encounter with some mods is Unusual End mods biomes not spawning (which is explained in the next question) Any recommendation to play with this mod ? -> It is heavily recommended to play with JEI for the additional informations it provides and recipes display. Also, End's Phantasm and Endless Biomes are great complements. Is this mod adding some compatibilities ? -> Yes, the mod is adding cross-compatibility with some other mods to fit in modpacks : - Curios (Some items will work from Curios slots) - Create (Additional recipes and minor compats) - Farmer's Delight (Food compats) - Ender's Delight (Minor compats) - JEI (Added recipes informations & additional "notes" for some features) - JEED (Effect descriptions) Wait, this mod is made with Mcreator ? -> Not anymore, recent versions (2.3+) are developped by Sasha, a Forge and Fabric dev. ~~-> Yes, it's mainly made with Mcreator, but not only. A lot of features were manually edited to allow me specific more advanced stuff (sure as the Podium's ability to render items, or animations not depending on Geckolib). A lot of things were also manually done or tweaked without it, and overall i'm more used to it than most other users, so it's very unlikely that you'll encounter common mcreator issues. It doesn't mean that i don't have any java knowledge, so if you encounter an issue, please report it, instead of, like some, assuming that i couldn't fix them, leaving issues unpatched !~~
Credits (Music) Thanks to **Redwolf** for creating the music for the Endstone Golem Theme, "Flying Ships," and "Queen," all available as Music Discs. Thanks to **Oh Height** for his tracks "The Great Abyss" and "Moog in Space 2," both now occasionally playing while in the End.
